allow: Bash(do echo "Deleting policy: $id" curl -X DELETE -s "http://localhost:3004/api/policies/$id" echo "" done)

Bash(do sed -i '' 's/import { VendorCategory, VendorTier, VendorStatus } from .@prisma\/client.;//g' "$file" sed -i '' 's/import { VendorStatus } from .@prisma\/client.;//g' "$file" sed -i '' 's/import { AssessmentType, AssessmentStatus } from .@prisma\/client.;//g' "$file" sed -i '' 's/import { AssessmentStatus } from .@prisma\/client.;//g' "$file" sed -i '' 's/import { ContractType, ContractStatus } from .@prisma\/client.;//g' "$file" sed -i '' 's/import { ContractStatus } from .@prisma\/client.;//g' "$file" done)
